leadText: The Asado Desert (Japanese: ロースト砂漠 Roast Desert) is a large desert in the Paldea region, stretching a portion of the region's West Province. It contains the city of Cascarrafa.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Asado Desert connects to West Province (Area Two) on the west and Cascarrafa on the east. The desert is very large and there will often be a sandstorm occuring. Like many other locations in Paldea, Asado Desert has a watchtower that serves as a fly point, however unlike other watchtowers, this one is mostly buried underneath the sand. There are several large rock formations throughout the desert that can be climbed once the player has unlocked the ability to climb walls on their Koraidon or Miraidon . The Quaking Earth Titan, Great Tusk S / Iron Treads V , one of the five Titan Pokémon of the Paldea region, can be found here.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Asado Desert Watchtower Cascarrafa
